---
title: "FIFA World Cup Data Analysis"
author: "Nguyễn Đào Trường Vy"
date: "2026-07-15"
output: html_document
---

# Student Information

**Student Name:** Nguyễn Đào Trường Vy  
**Student Number:** 22202382
**Subject Code:** COMP1013  
**Subject Name:** Analytics Programming  

**GitHub Repository:**  
https://github.com/yvette195/COMP1013-FIFA-WorldCup-Analysis

\newpage

# Question 1: Data Inspection, Cleaning and Home Penalty Distribution

## Rationale

Explain why the selected data-cleaning methods and chart type are appropriate.

## Data Inspection and Preparation

```{r question-1-data-preparation, echo=TRUE}
# Question 1 code will be written here
```
